name: python3-django-celery-results
title: python3-django-celery-results
summary: Celery result backends for Django (Python3 version)
description:
Celery result backends for Django (Python3 version)
This extension enables you to store Celery task results using the Django ORM.
.
It defines a single model (django_celery_results.models.TaskResult) used to
store task results, and you can query this database table like any other Django
model.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-django-celery-results because Celery result backends for Django (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-django-celery-results as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-django-celery-results with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-django-celery-results --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
